title: Content Type Union
description: Union vocabulary for content-type labels emitted by Courseforge on sections, callouts, and by Trainforge on chunks. Union-only per REC-VOC-03 — NOT enforced as a single field anywhere yet; each subtype is scoped to its emission site.
$comment: SectionContentType lifted from Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:388-405 (_infer_content_type return values: definition, example, procedure, comparison, exercise, overview, summary, explanation). CalloutContentType lifted from Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:448 (data-cf-content-type values on div.callout: application-note, note). ChunkType lifted from Trainforge/process_course.py:1372-1397 (_type_from_resource + _type_from_heading return values), then extended in Wave 81 with the four template-driven values (procedure, real_world_scenario, common_pitfall, problem_solution) emitted by Courseforge content-generator templates and propagated through html_content_parser via data-cf-template-type. Per REC-VOC-03 (union-only, not enforcement yet).

SectionContentType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Courseforge <h2>/<h3> via data-cf-content-type (_infer_content_type returns).

CalloutContentType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Courseforge <div class="callout"> via data-cf-content-type.

ChunkType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Trainforge chunks (chunk_type field). Six legacy values (assessment_item, overview, summary, exercise, explanation, example) lifted from _type_from_resource + _type_from_heading. Four Wave 81 additions (procedure, real_world_scenario, common_pitfall, problem_solution) propagated from Courseforge data-cf-template-type via Trainforge.parsers.html_content_parser when the section carries the attribute.

ContentType.description: Discriminated union of all content-type vocabularies. Consumers pick the specific subtype for their emission site.
